---
title: "fold_axis"
generated: true
description: "Fold the specified axis into the specified number of folds."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

*decorated:* `@partial(jax.jit, static_argnames=('axis', 'n_folds'))`

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:fold_axis -->
```python
fold_axis(tensor: Shaped[Array, ...], axis: int, n_folds: int) -> Shaped[Array, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:fold_axis -->
Fold the specified axis into the specified number of folds.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:fold_axis -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensor` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `axis` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `n_folds` | `int` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Shaped[Array, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
